case_title: DOMINO, HERMAN JR. vs. GOMEZ, TERESA IND. & PARTNERS DBA ANGEL'S TRUCKING et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINO, HERMAN JR. AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, TERESA IND. & PARTNERS DBA ANGEL'S TRUCKING ROSAIO, ANGEL IND. & PARTNERS DBA ANGEL'S TRUCKING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINO, HERMAN JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, TERESA IND. & PARTNERS DBA ANGEL'S TRUCKING ROSAIO, ANGEL IND. & PARTNERS DBA ANGEL'S TRUCKING $140.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00
